characters.name: Ada North
characters.description: Archivist; methodical, first through the door.

characters.name: Milo Voss
characters.description: Nervous insider who arrives suspiciously early.

places.name: The Archive
places.description: A converted bank vault holding the city's oldest ledgers.

notes.title: Planning note for Notes QA
notes.content: Raw ideas to organize: the blind spot in the archive cameras; who benefits from the missing ledger; whether Milo is a plant. Use the Assistant Notes actions (summarize / organize / extract / convert) on this note.

notes.title: PSYKE QA seed
notes.content: Seed for codex work: develop Ada's wound, Milo's hidden allegiance, and the Threshold theme. Use the Assistant PSYKE actions to expand these into story-bible entries.

notes.title: Unicode stress
notes.content: Unicode stress (QA): "Curly quotes", em dash — ellipsis … emoji 🐕, accented: Zampanò, città, perché.

scenes.title: The Archive Before Sunrise
scenes.content: Ada North enters the old archive before sunrise. Milo Voss waits by the locked cabinet, pretending not to be nervous.

psyke_entries.name: Threshold
psyke_entries.notes: A recurring motif about crossing from preparation into irreversible action.

psyke_entries.name: The Missing Ledger
psyke_entries.notes: The volume that should be in the locked cabinet and is not. Its absence drives the first act.
